texto: no matter how hard your shell is on the out side you will aways find some one who loves you
explicacao: Citação de Kelly Armstrong sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “no matter how hard your shell is on the out side you will aways find some one who loves you” articula reflexao, lovers, matter em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: It made a romantic tale. The young rouge, cheating death, returning to his grieving lover. But in reality? Ashyn had always known life did not resemble one of her book stories or Moria's bard tales, and yet there was a part of her that hoped it did. The more she saw, the more she realized she was wrong. People made up stories because that is what they wanted from their world. A place where goodness, kindness, and honor were rewarded. They were not rewarded. The people of Edgewood could attest to that. - Sea Of Shadows
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kelly Armstrong que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “It made a romantic tale. The young rouge, cheating death, returning to his grieving lover. But in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fiction, massacre, com foco em luto e massacre.

Ashyn had always known life did not resemble one of her book stories or Moria's bard tales, and yet there was a part of her that hoped it did. The more she saw, the more she realized she was wrong. People made up stories because that is what they wanted from their world. A place where goodness, kindness, and honor were rewarded. They were not rewarded. The people of Edgewood could attest to that. - Sea Of Shadows
